chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 5020 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.14371/2016 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate for the Petitioners Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
